ingredients_text: CRUST (WHEAT FLOUR, WATER, SOYBEAN OIL, PALM OIL(NATURAL FLAVOR, BETA CAROTENE), YEAST, PRESERVATIVE [CULTURED WHEAT STARCH, CITRIC ACID], DEXTROSE, SALT, WHITE CORNMEAL, L-CYSTEINE, SOY LECITHIN), SAUCE (WATER, CREAMY ROASTED GARLIC SAUCE MIX [MILK, BUTTERMILK, MODIFIED FOOD STARCH, GARLIC POWDER, SALT, MALTODEXTRIN, SOY LECITHIN, XANTHAN GUM, SPICE, NATURAL FLAVORS]), LOW MOISTURE PART-SKIM MOZZARELLA CHEESE (PASTEURIZED PART-SKIM MILK, CHEESE CULTURES, SALT, ENZYMES), CHEDDAR CHEESE (CULTURED PASTEURIZED MILK, SALT, ENZYMES, ANNATTO [COLOR]), JALAPEÑO PEPPERS, GREEN BELL PEPPERS, GREEN ONIONS, BREAD CRUMBS (WHEAT FLOUR, SUGAR, YEAST, SOYBEAN OIL, SALT)
